candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing row, not the preferred reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: On the balance sheet, this is the clearest cash/cash equivalents style label and it matches cash and cash equivalents end of period in the cash flow statement.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents end of the period
candidates.why: Semantically matches cash and cash equivalents, but target prefers balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents beginning of the period
candidates.why: Cash balance but for beginning of period, not balance sheet target.

variables.notes: Chose a balance-sheet label outside the shortlist because it clearly represents cash/cash equivalents and reconciles to cash flow ending cash.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Balancing row, not the preferred reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Direct short-term debt line on the balance sheet; best match for current debt and preferable to missing LT debt within 1 year line.
Candidate shortlist item for current portion of long-term debt, but preview is blank and less clearly the reported primary STD line than ST debt.

variables.notes: Used the explicit short-term debt line. Excludes leases and avoids double counting with any current portion rows.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Exact semantic match; valid even though preview values are blank.

candidates.why: Real estate asset line, but this is investment property under IFRS rather than property, plant and equipment.

variables.notes: R:c. No identifiable PPE line is present. 'Investment Properties' is not PPE for this mapping.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities after interest and taxes paid
candidates.why: Best match for net cash flow from operating activities / operating cash flow as the final operating cash flow subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities before change in net working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal, but not the final net operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities after interest and taxes paid

variables.notes: Chose the final operating cash flow line rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
